name: URL Canonicalizer
description: Resolves redirects to canonical URLs. Sends HEAD requests to each URL and replaces it with the final destination if redirected (301/302/307/308). Catches www/non-www, HTTP/HTTPS, path rewrites, and vanity URL redirects before they reach scraping.
usage_notes: Run after url-dedup and before url-filter. Makes one HEAD request per URL to detect redirects. URLs that redirect are replaced with their final destination. Dead URLs (timeout, DNS failure) are kept unchanged — url-filter handles liveness checks.

options.name: request_timeout
options.label: Request timeout (ms)
options.description: Timeout per HEAD request in milliseconds.

options.name: concurrency
options.label: Concurrent requests
options.description: How many HEAD requests to send in parallel.
